etymology.description: Depicts a calyx of a flower -> used phono-semantically in 否(否) (fǒu, "no") with 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth") to express negation -> borrowed back as synonym for 否 to mean "not"
etymology.interpretation: Originally depicted a calyx, the character 不 was used phonosemantically in 否(否) (fǒu, "no") to convey negation by combining with 口(口) (kǒu, "mouth"). This negation concept spread back to 不, shifting its meaning to "not". The calyx meaning is now expressed by 柎.

examples.chinese: 我不是医生(我不是醫生)。
他不想去公园(他不想去公園)。
examples.english: He doesn't want to go to the park.

examples.chinese: 天气不太好(天氣不太好)，所以我们待在家里(所以我們待在家裡)。
examples.pinyin: Tiānqì bù tài hǎo, suǒyǐ wǒmen dāi zài jiālǐ.
examples.english: The weather is not very good, so we stayed at home.
